worker_tasks.task_scope: Identify features exhibiting high redundancy while maintaining distinct class-conditioned distributions using feature-level distribution and duplication checks.
worker_tasks.stop_conditions: Stop after confirming features with both redundancy and class-conditioned distribution differences.

worker_tasks.task_scope: Analyze redundancy patterns within and across classes by verifying pairwise feature relations and dependency concentration to preserve redundancy context.
worker_tasks.stop_conditions: Stop when redundancy patterns and dependency clusters relevant to class distinctions are characterized.

worker_tasks.task_scope: Examine subsets of features for differential representational strength by class using structural summaries and local consistency verification to preserve evidence from related features.
worker_tasks.stop_conditions: Stop after identifying feature subsets with strong class-conditioned representational differences.
